concepts.title: Prediction drift and label shift
concepts.hook: Model input distribution changes (drift) or output distribution changes (label shift).

concepts.title: Model performance degradation (accuracy drop, calibration shift)
concepts.hook: Compare predictions against held-out validation set.

concepts.title: Feature distribution monitoring
concepts.hook: Alert if feature mean/std deviate from training; causes model degradation.

concepts.title: Missing value and anomaly monitoring
concepts.hook: Incomplete or corrupted features cause errors.

concepts.title: Data freshness
concepts.hook: Ensure data pipeline hasn't stalled; outdated data degrades predictions.

concepts.title: Schema drift and pipeline monitoring
concepts.hook: Upstream changes break downstream; version data schemas.

concepts.title: Retraining triggers (periodic, drift-based, performance-based)
concepts.hook: When to update model? Cost vs benefit; detect degradation.

concepts.title: Online learning and incremental updates
concepts.hook: Update model with new data without full retraining; works for some models.

concepts.title: Experiment tracking and model registry
concepts.hook: MLflow, Weights & Biases; track experiments, models, parameters.

concepts.title: Reproducibility and versioning
concepts.hook: Track code, data, seeds; reproduce results.
